name: industrial-incident-triage
description: Analyze industrial alarms, work orders, and abnormal states, then produce auditable response proposals without direct execution.

agents.name: incident-response-commander
agents.role: Structure the incident, severity, response sequence, and escalation path.

agents.name: data-engineer
agents.role: Check time-series alignment, missing values, stale state, and data quality risks.

agents.name: reality-checker
agents.role: Challenge weak assumptions, unverifiable claims, and unsafe shortcuts.

agents.name: compliance-auditor
agents.role: Identify approval needs, forbidden actions, and audit requirements.

agents.name: evidence-collector
agents.role: Bundle evidence, unknowns, timeline, and operator-facing handoff notes.
